description: Defines frontend architecture rules for page controllers, shared utilities, endpoint usage, and modularity.

rules.name: Page controllers use shared API utilities
rules.description: Frontend page controllers must use shared API helper functions rather than raw fetch calls where project utilities exist.

rules.name: Page controllers use shared endpoint registry
rules.description: Frontend page controllers must use LLA_API_ENDPOINTS or equivalent shared endpoint registries for backend calls.

rules.name: Page controllers use shared path registry
rules.description: Frontend navigation should use the shared frontend path registry instead of hardcoded page URLs when a path exists there.

rules.name: Frontend files should remain responsibility-focused
rules.description: Large frontend files should be split into smaller responsibility-based modules when they become difficult to maintain.

rules.name: Frontend must escape rendered data
rules.description: Dynamic data rendered into HTML strings must be escaped using shared escaping utilities.

rules.name: Frontend pages should separate rendering from orchestration
rules.description: DOM rendering, state management, navigation, API communication, and interaction orchestration should be separated into focused modules/helpers when frontend complexity grows.
